problem: Dentists practicing dental sleep medicine, TMD treatment, and oral surgery need specialized software for medical billing reimbursement, documentation of medical necessity, and physician communication
solution: Web-based EMR software specialized for dental sleep medicine, TMD, and oral surgery with automated SOAP reports of medical necessity, intelligent cross-coding from dental to medical ICD-10/CPT codes, integrated medical billing concierge service, and online patient intake questionnaires for 3,500+ dental practices
